issues.description: Condition is incomplete. Must check: (1) HasCardOnBoard with type filter for yellow Supernovas, (2) exclude [Scratchmen Apoo] by name. Current condition only checks HasCardOnBoard without type or exclusion filter.
HasCardOnBoard condition needs additional properties: 'color' (yellow), 'cardType' (Supernovas), and 'excludeName' (Scratchmen Apoo) to properly validate the full requirement.
